channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Austria is pursuing a social media ban for kids under 14
item.description: Austria is the latest country to prepare a social media ban for its children, but it's going even further than others by including anyone under 14. In a press release, the Austrian government said it has introduced a comprehensive catalogue of measures meant to shield minors from the harms of social media. According to the press release, an official bill will be introduced by the end of June. Andreas Babler, a vice chancellor and leader of the Social Democratic Party of Austria, said the government's efforts would include the new age restriction, improved media literacy and clear rules for soc...

item.title: 139 voitures électriques analysées sur long trajet, la nouvelle Xiaomi SU7, la Renault Twingo bientôt à 11 000 € ? – Récap’ Survoltés
item.description: La semaine était électrique sur Survoltés : on a conduit la nouvelle voiture électrique de Xiaomi, la Renault Twingo électrique va devenir encore moins chère (et on a pu la tester), et surtout 139 voitures électriques ont été comparé sur longs trajets.

item.title: ‘My mirrorless camera didn’t get a look in’ – the DJI Osmo Action 4 was my ultimate vacation camera, and it just dropped to a record-low price
item.description: This rugged, waterproof action cam is perfect for taking on adventures, and now's the time to buy.

item.title: IKEA spring bedroom trends: refresh your space with muted gray and seafoam accessories
item.description: Get your bedroom springtime-ready with cooling bedding, useful gadgets and charming accessories.

item.title: Ranking 2016’s Superhero Debuts, 10 Years Later
item.description: From 'Batman v Superman' to 'Captain America: Civil War' and 'Suicide Squad,' which superhero from 2016 made the most enduring impression?

item.title: Cet écran gaming OLED (240 Hz, 0,03 ms) équipé de l’Ambiglow peut se trouver pour 130 euros de moins chez Boulanger
item.description: Le Philips Evnia est un écran gaming très complet renforcé par la technologie Ambiglow. En ce moment chez Boulanger, il est vendu pour 419,99 euros au lieu de 549,99 euros.

item.title: Huawei reveals its latest Nvidia H20 killer — packing a frankly ridiculous 1.56 PFLOPS of FP4 compute and up to 112GB of HBM
item.description: Huawei launches Atlas 350 with Ascend 950PR, offering high FP4 compute, improved memory performance, and competitive positioning against Nvidia H20 hardware.

item.title: Suno leans into customization with v5.5
item.description: Suno just released one of its biggest updates yet with v5.5 of its AI music model. Where previous updates focused mostly on improving fidelity and creating more natural vocals, v5.5 is about giving users more control. It includes three new features: Voices, My Taste, and Custom Models. In the release notes, Suno says that Voices […]

item.title: Ive tested dozens of portable power stations — heres what Id actually buy in Amazons Big Spring Sale
item.description: Portable power stations from Bluetti, Anker Solix, Jackery, and more are over 50% off during the Amazon Big Spring Sale.

item.title: FCC listing suggests the Trump T1 phone is somehow actually real
item.description: The Trump T1 smartphone has felt fake every step of the way, but a new FCC listing implies that it's actually a real product.

item.title: Vidéoprojecteur à ultra courte focale (UST) : quel modèle choisir pour votre salon en 2026 ?
item.description: Envie d'une image de plusieurs mètres de large, mais pas envie de percer des trous dans le plafond pour installer un vidéoprojecteur ? Nous avons choisi les meilleurs modèles de vidéoprojecteurs à courte et ultra courte focale, que nous avons pu tester.

item.title: The White House app is just as weird and unnecessary as you'd expect
item.description: President Donald Trump may have a tendency to put his name on everything, but his administration decided to go with the more authoritative The White House App for his latest pursuit. Now available on the App Store and Google Play store, the official White House App claims to gives Americans "a direct line to the White House." From the press release, the app provides "unfiltered, real-time upgrades straight from the source." In more practical terms, the White House App is a one-stop shop for official communications from the administration and more. On the app, you can find press releases, lives...

item.title: The best iPad deals from Amazons spring sale: M3 iPad Airs are up to $200 off (but starting to sell out)
item.description: Shop the best iPad deals from Apple during Amazon's 2026 Big Spring Sale. Some M3 iPad Airs are sitting at record-low prices.

item.title: Kingdom Come: Deliverance 2 translator says developers fired him to use AI
item.description: A Czech-to-English translator for Kingdom Come: Deliverance 2 took to Reddit to complain about AI making his job "obsolete."
